title: Cache-aware prompt ordering for claude -p delegations
description: build_prompt() (delegate.py:1270-1532) reassembles the full prompt per delegation with no attention to cache-friendly ordering, and no prompt caching is used anywhere. Static blocks (agent_identity, ROLE_RUBRICS, reasoning_protocol, few-shot examples, output-format spec) are interleaved with per-ticket dynamic content (ticket description, sprint context, team context, agent memory). Reordering so all role-stable content forms a stable prefix and all ticket-specific content trails it lets the CLI's automatic prompt cache hit on the large static prefix, cutting input-token cost and latency on every sprint where one role runs many tickets.
proposed_changes: In build_prompt() restructure assembly into two segments: (1) STABLE_PREFIX = agent_identity + specialization + ROLE_RUBRICS[role] + constraints + reasoning_protocol + few-shot examples + output-format spec, emitted byte-identically per role; (2) DYNAMIC_SUFFIX = ticket description, target_files boundaries, sprint context, team context, agent memory. Concatenate prefix-then-suffix. Add a module-level cache of the rendered STABLE_PREFIX keyed by (role, model) so the same string is reused verbatim across tickets in a sprint, maximizing CLI prompt-cache hits.
reject_reason: Apply failed: Evolve timed out after 300s
